name: Eggplant Mozzarella Bbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large saucepan over low heat, cook green onion and mushrooms in 1/4 cup water until tender.
3. Add spaghetti sauce; bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 20 to 25 minutes.
4. Sprinkle salt over sliced eggplant; set aside to drain about 10 minutes.
5. In a shallow bowl, beat egg white and water together.
6. Dip each eggplant slice in the egg mixture, then into flour.
7. Heat a few drops of olive oil in a large non-stick skillet over medium heat.
8. Add eggplant slices and cook until browned, turning once; drain on paper towels.
9. Continue cooking all slices until done.
10. In a 13" x 9" casserole dish, spread about 1/2 cup sauce.
11. Add a layer of eggplant, top with 1/2 cup cottage cheese and more sauce.
12. Repeat layers until all ingredients are used, ending with sauce.
13. Sprinkle with shredded mozzarella cheese.
14. Bake uncovered for 30 minutes. Let stand 5 minutes.
